title: chilianthus corrugatus
intro: Chilianthus corrugatus, also known as the Rough Chilianthus, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Chilianthus corrugatus include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments.
